title: Procedure: Preparation of xanthan and carbopol model fluids
author: Lalo, Avar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Laboratory procedure used in this thesis for preparation of xanthan- and carbopol-based model fluids. The document describes weighing of water and additives, mixing with a hand blender, addition of sugar or 5% NaOH where applicable, and labeling and storage of the prepared samples. This procedure is part of the thesis  Experimental Investigation of Displacement Flow in Irregular Annuli . The procedure was used to prepare model fluids for the experimental work carried out at the University of Stavanger (UiS).
